entry.title: Re: Comparing MD07 - MD04 Vs Monitor material coverage app - 1/2
entry.content:
Hi,

Regarding User Case 2. We have a similar case, only difference is that Stock Availability in green for hole horizon and in Monitor Material Coverage is showing Days' Supply 999 (positive) as MD04 and MD07 -999 (negative).

I'm expecting to see grey color like it is stated in SAP Note 2825401 - Display Safety Stock as Shortage have stated "If no goods movement has ever been posted for a material, the availability chart is shown in grey and the popover shows "No data" but our business requirement is to see red color.

In Configuration we can set-up Shortage Definition and rules for Supply and Demand. Would that solve our issue? Any comments from anybody highly appreciated!

entry.title: Re: Error FS 861 in External Tax System
entry.content:
Routine 500 and 510 calls external tax system (Vertex) only if country is one of three, US,CA or PR.
Now our client bought an entity in Mexico to be brought over into SAP. What would be the best approach for Tax calculation? 

Thanks a lot in advance.

entry.title: GR and GI Areas for Multiple Plants Linked to a Single Whse: Which storage type to use?
entry.content:
As 10 different plants are connected to one warehouse, each plant having one GR and GI area. Based on plant we need to determine  GR and GI area for inbound and outbound tasks.

Please advise, what type of storage type needs to be created and what configs need to be maintained to achieve the same.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: GR and GI Areas for Multiple Plants Linked to a Singl...
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

Please look at the description of each storage type available to create a template to help with this internal decision:

  • Standard storage
    A standard storage type doesn't have any special attributes, as opposed to fixed bin and bulk storage types. The system stores the products in any suitable storage bin. The location of a product in the storage type may change over time as a different product can be stored in a storage bin when it becomes empty. You can't use mixed storage in individual storage bins in the standard storage type.
      You can use handlin
    g units (HUs) in the standard storage type. HUs are optional.
  • Fixed bin storage

In a fixed bin storage type, each product is permanently assigned to one or more storage bins and is always stored there. The assignment must be done using the Assign Fixed Bins app. If a storage bin runs out of stock, the product assignment remains. You mustn't use HUs in this storage type. If you create HUs for a fixed bin storage type, the system deletes them during confirmation of warehouse tasks.

  • Bulk storage
    A bulk storage type is often used for products that are handled in large quantities and therefore take up a large amount of storage space. The advantages of bulk storage include a reduced need for physical storage bins, fast access to the containers, and a clear structuring of the warehouse into blocks and rows. You can't use mixed storage in individual storage bins in the bulk storage type.
    HUs are mandatory in the bulk storage type.
  • General storage
    A general storage type has only one storage bin assigned to it, which allows mixed storage. It's designed for a small number of products.
    Because the general storage type has only one storage bin, it's not intended for a large number of products. The system doesn't know the exact location of the products in the storage bin and can't support you by finding the products in the storage bin.
    You can use HUs in the general storage type. HUs are optional.

Please note:

You can't create or change storage types with the default storage type template. This template is used by SAP Best Practices to create storage types that are needed for certain warehouse processes, such as:

  • Goods receipt
  • Goods issue
  • Clarification
  • Scrapping
  • Production supply

 

To create it on your end, please make sure to perform the configurations for Master Data: Configuration for Master Data.

 

Thank you and best regards,

SAP Support.

entry.title: procedimiento almacenado
entry.content:
Hola muy buen dia comunidad, Saludos cordiales 

Estoy trabajando en un informe de estado de resultado a partir de un procedimiento alamcenado. el problema esq en los ingresos tengo ventas exoneradas dichas ventas no tienen impuestos por lo que no debenrian de sumarse a mi total de ventas gravadas las ventas netas gravadas debenrian de ser: venta gravadas - devoluciones por ventas gravadas. pero en este caso me esta sumando el monto de las ventas exoneradas cuando esas solo deberian de sumarse a las ventas 

Imagen adjunta de los resultados del proceso almacenado.

LOS RESULTADOS CORRECTOS DE VENTAS GRAVADAS NETAS DEBERIA DE SER 2,401,738 menos 104,780,79  : 2.296.957,21

YA LAS VENTASDEBERIA DE SER LA VENTAS GRAVADAS NETAS MAS LAS VENTAS EXONERDAS MAS VENTAS EXENTAS. 2.296.957,21 mas 9.919 mas 14.972,17 : 2.321.848,38. ESTE DATO ESTA BIEN

ANTERIORMENTE INTENTE EDITAR la SUBCONSULTA QUE ES LA QUE ME TOMA EL MONTO PERO SOLO LOGRE QUITAR LAS VENTAS EXONERDAS Y NECESITO QUE SE SIGAN MOSTRANDO PARA OBTENEREL TOTAL DE LAS VENTAS. LO QUE NECESITO ESQ LAS VENTAS EXONERDAS NO SE SUMEN AL TOTAL DE LAS VENTAS GRAVADAS. SOLO NECESITO QUE SE VENA REFLEJADAS EN LAS VENTAS

entry.title: DPAGENT Monitor - Datasphere
entry.content:
Hello Community, I have connected the Agent with Datasphere and in the monitor you can always see memory consumption, whether or not it is running dataflows.Normally it is usually at 70% and does not fall below this consumption, the machine where the agent is has 14 GB of dedicated ram.

My question is:
Is it normal that this % of use does not go down?

Can I make consumption go down if it is not being used?
When I run a dataflow it goes up from 70%, that is, it goes up to 75 or 80%

Best regards.

Hello,

My solution to task 3:
1. General preview

2. Preview based on the search field

3. Preview from filtering 'StatusText' field based on OverallStatus text.

Thank you!😊

BR, Nevena

entry.title: Datalake Datasphere Load Time
entry.content:
Hello community,
I have a physical table loaded with the entire year 2023 and each month has an average of 25 million records.
I have a connection to the datalake in Datasphere and its respective table.
My question is with the times it takes to load the physical table from datasphere to datalake, to upload 25 or 26 million records takes almost 6 hours.

 

Runtime

DataFlow

Properties

Number of records

My question is as follows:
Are these load times normal? Since an ERP upload to Datasphere for the same year through the agent does not take that long.

Is it okay to upload to datalake via a dataflow?
Is there a more efficient alternative to uploading to datalake?

entry.title: Re: Help Needed: Updating Target API Level to 34 for Google Play Compliance
entry.content: still nothing 🙃

entry.title: What's New in SAP Operational Workforce Planning
entry.content:
Introduction

Workforce planning is a critical process for any organization that wants to optimize its human capital and align it with its strategic goals. However, workforce planning can be challenging, especially in times of uncertainty and change. That's why we are excited to announce the new release of the Operational Workforce Planning business content package powered by SAP Analytics Cloud, a comprehensive and flexible solution that helps you plan, analyze, and optimize your workforce in an agile and collaborative way.

 

What is SAP Analytics Cloud Business Content?

SAP Analytics Cloud business content is a collection of ready-to-use templates, dashboards, stories, and data models that cover various business scenarios and domains. By using business content, you can jumpstart your analytics journey and leverage best practices and industry standards. You can also customize and extend the business content to suit your specific needs and preferences. SAP Analytics Cloud business content is available for free for all SAP Analytics Cloud customers and partners, and you can browse more information on the SAP Analytics Cloud business content Community Page.

 

What's New in this 2024 Version

The new version of the Operational Workforce Planning business content package offers a number of enhancements and improvements that make it easier, faster, and more intuitive to use. Here are some of the key features and benefits of the new version:

  • Refreshed Look and Feel: The new version follows the SAP Fiori Horizon theme, providing a more seamless user experience when navigating across SAP Success Factors or SAP S/4HANA, and this Workforce Planning business content. The new theme also enhances the readability and aesthetics of the stories and charts.

Refreshed look with more dynamic user interface

 

  • Optimized Stories: The Analytic Apps found in the legacy HXM Operational Workforce Planning have now been updated to Optimized Stories, which provide improved performance and ensure future compatibility with SAP Analytics Cloud.
  • Navigation Menu: A new Navigation menu has been introduced, which improves the user experience when navigating from one story to the next. You can easily access the different planning scenarios, such as top-down aggregated headcount planning or bottom-up detailed headcount planning, as well as the overview, configuration, and reporting  pages.

New menu provides streamlined navigation

 

 

  • Collapsible Side Panels: A new collapsible side panel with multiple drawers has been introduced on the left side of the screen, which maximizes screen real estate to focus on planning activities, while still having convenient access to commonly used elements like filters and help links. You can also access a new comment panel to track threaded discussions during the planning process. On the right side of the screen, you can find another collapsible side panel, which offers the most commonly sought after chart visualizations and corresponding chart filters.

Reusable composite widgets provide dynamic interaction with collapsible side panels

 

  • Redesigned Report Pages: The report pages have been redesigned to align with the requests of several of our premier Workforce Planning implementation partners. You can now view more relevant and actionable information on your workforce planning outcomes and compare various versions against each other.

Redesigned report layouts

 

  • Composites: The new version introduces Composites, which are bespoke reusable components that allow for ease of centralized configurations during implementations. You can use Composites to centrally define and manage common elements used multiple times across stories. This reduces the complexity and maintenance effort of the business content package.

 

Housekeeping Tips

If you have used the HXM Operational Workforce Planning business content package in the past, here are some housekeeping tips to help you transition to the new version:

  • When searching the business content network for this content package, search for “Operational Workforce Planning” or more generically “xP&A” to find this package along with other featured xP&A business content.
  • Our business content folder structure has evolved since HXM Operational Workforce Planning was originally released. If you previously installed the legacy content package, and are now upgrading to this new release, you will want to relocate the Model and Data Actions into the new folders as detailed in the User Help Docs. You can also archive the legacy Analytic Apps, which are now replaced by Optimized Stories.

 

Conclusion

The new release of the Operational Workforce Planning business content package powered by SAP Analytics Cloud is a major milestone in our continuous effort to provide you with the best-in-class solution for workforce planning. With the new features and enhancements, you can plan, analyze, and optimize your workforce with more efficiency, agility, and collaboration. Whether you are a new or existing user of this business content package, we encourage you to explore the new version and discover how it can help you achieve your workforce planning objectives. To learn more about SAP Workforce Planning business content, as well as our other featured Extended Planning and Analysis (xP&A) business content, please visit our xP&A Community Page.

entry.title: Re: Intracompany STO for EWM managed warehouse
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

Does this process work for an Intracompany STO where the sending plant is on EWM and the receiving plant is on a non-SAP system? Can we create an STO with a freight order (FO)? If not, then if we use an STO with a shipment, how do we utilize the functionality of Shipment Readiness and update Pack IDs into the shipment before PGI? Do we need to implement enhancements, or is there any function module (FM) available in EWM to update the shipment in S/4?

entry.title: Re: We have a requirement to aggregate the data in Techni...
entry.content:
Hi @Venky038, please review Help Potal > SAP6 Sample Planning Area for Demand > Time Profile > WEEKOFQUARTER and MONTHOFQUARTER:

In case the [...] is split across two [...] it needs to be assigned to the [...] to which more days belong to.

Perhaps, this can be inspiration in order for you to define your own custom Time Attribute XYZ, in your Time Profile, you can then maintain the values, by manually (or via an Excel calculation / algorithm) inspecting once in which Technical Week you would like to add the values (you mentioned you are interested in the Technical Week A or B which holds the most days in a ...). After you have determined the appropriate Technical Week via your algorithm, then go ahead and mark/hardcode all the appropriate Technical Weeks for example by maintaining value 1 in your custom Time Attribute XYZ in the Time Profile.

Later, in your Key Figure calculation you can use this Time Attribute in your Key Figure formula. Disaggregation then (or making sure the values are shifted towards the Technical Weeks which have value 1 maintained for your Time Attribute XYZ), you can do, by using a Copy Operator which reads for example on Month or Quarter level, and playing with the Disaggregation settings of the Target Key Figure to only Disaggregate to those values 1 (Note: I always prefer Disaggregation using a Copy Operator, instead of using Disaggregation via Calculated Key Figure split only, since otherwise you end up getting decimals and losing or gaining values, whereas the HANA Disaggregation Engine keeps the totals equal).

Please let me know if it can help, and if not feel free to ask a follow-up question and/or clarify with an exact example and intended outcome.

entry.title: Re: How to use User_Defined Transform in Data Services 4.x using Python Part-1
entry.content:
@kamal264 

Thanks for the detailed blog. There is a tweak to the code which you have used.

 

import re

# Defining local variable
dct = locals()

# Getting salary into local variable
dct[u'SALARY'] = record.GetField(u'SALARY')

# Replace all special characters from Salary to match any character that is not a digit, letter, or underscore.
dct[u'SALARY'] = re.sub(r"[^0-9a-zA-Z_]", "", dct[u'SALARY'])

# Update the output fields Standard Salary
record.SetField(u'STD_SALARY', dct[u'SALARY'])

entry.title: Re: Task 3 - Enhancing CDS View Entities with Annotations
entry.content: Out of curiosity, what fuzziness value are people using?

entry.title: Re: How to show the Planning Periods(Start Date,End Date) those are defined in the Version Dimension
entry.content:
Hi @james_lim 

Unfortunately, this is a not supported & potentially unstable solution because as SAP note 3397906 describes: "Planningmodel getMember API does not support non-generic dimensions (like Version or Organisation). If this API is used mistakenly on a non generic Dimension, it may return incorrect data."

entry.title: 🔴 Harnessing S/4HANA Events in SAP Build
entry.content:
In this demo you will learn how to:
- Set up Event Mesh and SAP S/4HANA Cloud System for Events Connectivity using S/4HANA Extensibility
- Integrate events into the SAP Build Ecosystem using discovery and manual upload via Lobby
-  Utilize events in SAP Business Process Automation from the Library
-  Check the events logs in Monitor Events section
- Use Run Now without connecting to the S/4HANA System for validation of end-to-end process

entry.title: Re: Custom Situation Handling Use Case for Professional Services: Unstaffed Resource Requests
entry.content:
This blog is great! Thanks so much.

I have mananged to create a custom situation scenario for STOs (with a custom CDS View+ Navigation to a couple of Fiori Apps) and I use the Badi that you indicated to have a custom logic to decide who get the messages based on STO Type (My client doesn't have HR configured). There is just one issue: The Batch Triggering is Not working. It works just when I click on the button "Trigger Batch", but not with the Batch Triggering Schedule Time. I found the Job that is doing that bit, SIT_TECH_JOB_BATCH_DAILY and is running in my system every hour, so I have run it in debug mode and find out that my custom situation type is not in the table SIT_DEF and for that reason is not being pick up so I have 2 questions:

1) Do we have to use another job to schedule Custom Situation Handling Types?

2) Where is My custom situation type? I can see it in the Fiori App (Manage Situation Types - Extended) but I haven't found it in any table that I have checked in my S/4 system. Do that means that is not really active ( I can see it as Enable in the Fiori App ).

Thanks in advance, 3 weeks ago I didn't know what situation handling was and now i'm about to show a POC to my client in New Zealand. I'm using an S/4HANA on Premises 2023 for my demo.

entry.title: How to extract plan and actual costs for PM orders if PMCO table is not showing all of the orders?
entry.content:
We are trying to extract the plan and actual costs for PM orders, at first  we tried using AUFK and PMCO, however comparing the results against IW39 or IW33, the table PMCO don´t show data for many orders. After that we tried looking in COSP table but don´t show PM orders.  

How could we extract the actual and plan costs for PM orders in S4/Hana?

Thanks

entry.title: BTP problem to activate Signavio
entry.content: When I go to the BTP cockpit https://cockpit.btp.cloud.sap/ only the ALM appears as a global account; when I activate the SIgnavio through the Boosters, it gives me an error because of that.

entry.title: spring security intercept pattern override
entry.content:
Hi all!

I'm currently developing an occ extension wich I need to be able to repond in a non secure way (http protocol, port 9001). Now every time I do a call to any of its endpoints, the request is redirected to the ssl port. This happens because a configuration made in security-v2-spring.xml in the "commercewebservices" extension (line 13 down here):

<!-- Swagger resources -->
	<security:http pattern="/v2/swagger-ui*/**" security="none"/>
	<security:http pattern="/v2/api-docs*/**" security="none"/>

	<!-- Commerce Webservices V2-->
	<http pattern="/v2/**" entry-point-ref="oauthAuthenticationEntryPointV2"
	      access-decision-manager-ref="webSecurityAccessDecisionManager"
	      xmlns="http://www.springframework.org/schema/security" create-session="stateless">

		<anonymous username="anonymous" granted-authority="ROLE_ANONYMOUS"/>
		<!--<session-management session-authentication-strategy-ref="fixation"/>-->

		<intercept-url pattern="/**" requires-channel="https"/>

		...
	</http>

My first try was to override the pattern "/v2/**" with this code in <myextension>-web-spring.xml

<security:http pattern="/v2/**" entry-point-ref="oauthAuthenticationEntryPointV2">
        <security:intercept-url pattern="/**" requires-channel="any" />
    </security:http>

 but I got the next error:

GRAVE: Excepción al enviar evento inicializado de contexto a instancia de escuchador de clase [de.hybris.platform.spring.HybrisContextLoaderListener]
org.springframework.beans.factory.BeanCreationException: Error creating bean with name 'defaultCommerceWebServicesFilterChainListV2': Cannot resolve reference to bean 'springSecurityFilterChain' while setting bean property 'sourceList' with key [7]; nested exception is org.springframework.beans.factory.BeanCreationException: Error creating bean with name 'org.springframework.security.filterChainProxy': Invocation of init method failed; nested exception is java.lang.IllegalArgumentException: The FilterChainProxy contains two filter chains using the matcher Ant [pattern='/v2/**']. If you are using multiple <http> namespace elements, you must use a 'pattern' attribute to define the request patterns to which they apply.

The urls of the request is something like http://<host>/occ/v2/<site>/mocks/<anyPath> So I try to make a new pattern:

<security:http pattern="/v2/*/mocks/**" entry-point-ref="oauthAuthenticationEntryPointV2">
    <security:intercept-url pattern="/**" requires-channel="any" />
</security:http>

But the filter spring security creates is inserted at the end of the FilterChainProxy, so OOTB intercept pattern is cheecked first and captured the request.

I think I know what I need, that is to add my pattern before OOTB patterns are added in commercewebservices, but I cannot find a way to do that. Any ideas that could help me with this issue?

 

Thank you in advance.

Ignacio

entry.title: Re: Sessions TechEd Virtual VS Live
entry.content:
My suggestion, prioritize 🙂 It's impossible to follow everything. Many sessions have some overlap which you can detect based on the description. Often sessions which have topics that are close to each other will have overlap and maybe you're not interested in the part that doesn't overlap?!

Priorities for me are:

  1. live is always first priority 🙂
  2. virtual, pick the sessions that are close to your profile to stay up to date
  3. virtual, innovative topics are always good to have in your agenda to learn new things
  4. topics you are interested but not that close or also not that innovative, keep it in your backlog. You can normally watch the virtual once afterwards 😉

Hope this helps a bit!

entry.title: Re: How to show the Planning Periods(Start Date,End Date) those are defined in the Version Dimension
entry.content:
@JefB 

I checked that note but it works well in SAC version 2024.15.5. (2024.Q3 release)

Please check it from your side and let me know if it still does not work because API docs are updated quarterly. I do not get any error and it returned correct values. 😅

Note: when you set the input control, please turn off cascading and remove 'select all' because I used getActiveSelectedMembersWithUnbooked method.

Thanks for your quick comment!

Unfortunately I dont have a fixed assets option in importing from Excel

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud Live data connection to SAP SuccessFactors
entry.content:
Hi Maheshwar,

Thanks for sharing this very instructive detailed blog. 

With SAP BW live connection, we can leverage in SAC the BW authorization setup in SAP BW.

Is this option already available with SAP SuccessFactors live connection or planned to be release in the short-or-mid-term timeline?

Thanks,

Michel

entry.title: Re: Integrate Document Information Extraction into UI5 application
entry.content:
Hi @prabhatpathania,

Thanks for your comment. I have updated the xs-app.json route as below, and now it's working. In the "target" property, the slash before the "$1" was removed.

        {
            "source": "^/doc-info-extraction/(.*)$",
            "target": "$1",
            "destination": "doc-info-extraction",
            "csrfProtection": false
        },

entry.title: Node calculation formulas
entry.content:
Hello everybody, 

how can I create more (custom) formulas line at the node level that are in the application Define Financial Statement Nodes: Node Calculation? Where do you create it?

Thank you

entry.content: We are uploading the bank file in employee central.  However, the maximum bank name allowed in Employee Central is limited to 15 characters. Is there a way to increase the length of the bank names in SF Employee Central?  Very much appreciate the steps to get this done.

entry.title: Re: Integrate Document Information Extraction into UI5 application
entry.content: @MioYasutake  - thank you for the fix. Works well now.

entry.title: 🔴 Automate your SAP Cloud Integration governance with CPILint
entry.content:
CPILint is an open source tool that makes checking your integration flows for governance compliance super easy. The tool ships with built-in rules that cover topics like naming conventions, development guidelines and security. You choose the relevant rules, and CPILint does the heavy lifting of checking the integration flows in your tenant for compliance.

In this session, you will get an introduction to CPILint, and get to see a live demo of the tool.

entry.title: 🔴 Speed up your SAP Cloud Integration Development with CPI-Helper
entry.content: Join for an in-depth session on CPI-Helper, the open-source browser extension that allows you to keep trace mode enabled for longer and debug Integration Flows faster than ever before. Learn best practices that will prevent you from accidentally editing Integration Flows in production, and delve into the history of CPI-Helper. Discover how you, too, can contribute. Whether you’re an SAP Integration Expert or just getting started, this session will equip you with skills that save time.

entry.title: 🔴 FlashPipe - Your CI/CD Companion for SAP Integration Suite
entry.content: Learn about FlashPipe, the Continuous Integration and Continuous Deployment (CI/CD) solution tailored specifically for the SAP Integration Suite. Discover the key features and benefits of FlashPipe, and how it integrates seamlessly with the SAP Integration Suite to automate your CI/CD pipelines. Experience a live demonstration of FlashPipe in action, showcasing its powerful capabilities. Don’t miss this opportunity to revolutionize your CI/CD processes and elevate your SAP Integration Suite experience.

entry.title: 🔴 CloudEvents for interoperable event systems
entry.content: The CloudEvents project of the Cloud Native Computing Foundation (CNCF) provides a specification for describing event data in common formats. Events from SAP applications that are documented on the SAP Business Accelerator Hub are also based on this specification. This session provides an introduction to CloudEvents, explains the practical use and gives an outlook on xRegistry, another initiative the CloudEvents project is working on.

entry.title: 🔴 Developing modern terminal-based tools for SAP Cloud Integration
entry.content: In this session, we will explore practical reasons for using terminal-based applications when working with SAP Cloud Integration. We will examine scenarios where these tools can enhance the SAP Cloud Integration developer experience by enriching their toolbox, which traditionally relies on popular browsers, code editors, and IDEs. Additionally, we will delve into a sample application that illustrates the typical essential layers and building blocks. While this application leverages a Go-based technology stack, the underlying concepts and key ideas are universally applicable and can be used across a wide range of technologies.

entry.title: Re: Aggregation of rate elements with rate subelements Su...
entry.content:
Dear Carsten,

I was going to test your solution for the fixed rate for tier 1 to 19 using the suitable quantity and I would really appreciate some further clarifications if it's not too much to ask.

a) have a lookup table with the minimum quantity (e.g. 19 EA) as an output column. Replace EA if you use another one for the rate element.
-> I'm using lookup table UsagePrice, should I copy it and then add the minimum qty in the table outputs next to "price" or do you mean I should create a new field "minimumQuantity" then create the corresponding lookup table with only the minimum qty in the table outputs? 
->in the Lookup Table Outputs, blocksize is the only code I can select that has field type "quantity" (see screenshot below), is this the code I should add in the Lookup Table Outputs?
b) determine highest value of the quantity and the minimum quantity using the Suitable Quantity operator.
c) use this suitable quantity to calculate the price element. The price condition type Single with a linear price type would do the job.
-> do you mean that I have to create a price element specification for the new lookup table based on the new field "minimumQuantity" ? how exactly can I add this to the price element specification of my UsagePrice to calculate the fixed price for up to 19 units, and unit price for 20+ units?

I apologize for all the questions, I'm new to Subscription billing and I'm trying to catch up quickly.
You help is highly appreciated!
Kr,
Elena

entry.title: 🔴 Navigating EDA Complexity: SAP Integration Suite Advanced Event Mesh and AEM Event Portal Solutio
entry.content:
As enterprises are becoming increasingly agile and responsive, adopting Event-driven Architecture is critical. However fully leveraging EDA for its benefits comes with its set of challenges. Most enterprises often struggle with understanding the intricate landscape of events, managing event descriptions, identifying and visualizing event flows across multiple applications etc.

Although there are plenty of discussions and blogs about the SAP Integration Suite’s Advanced Event Mesh, its features and benefits, its event portal capabilities remain somewhat under-explored and under appreciated. This talk will dive into the need of an event portal, the capabilities of the AEM Event Portal and how it helps enterprises get a better grip on their EDA landscape.

A key highlight of this presentation is an innovative open-source utility tool developed by Solace. This tool integrates seamlessly with the AEM Event Portal and generates SAP Integration Suite Iflow artifact based on application defintiion within the Event Portal. This Iflow artifact can be direcly imported into the SAP Integration Suite and used by SAP developers to build event driven integration flows inline with SAP standards.

By the end of this session, you will have :
- A clean demonstration of the AEM Event Portal’s capabilities
- An introduction to the Solace open-source utility tool and its role in generating Iflow artifacts
- Real world use cases showcasing the practical implementation and benefits of these technologies.

entry.title: Re: Need an approval step to be added to Crossboarding ta...
entry.content: Thanks a lot. Looking forward to this change in future.

entry.title: Re: Need an approval step to be added to Crossboarding ta...
entry.content: Accepting this solution by @emily_nagengast .

entry.title: 🔴 Source-side filtering of RAP business events in SAP BTP ABAP Environment and in Advanced Event Me
entry.content: Facilitate source-side filtering of RAP business events in SAP BTP ABAP Environment using custom context attributes for more sophisticated event dispatching. Use dynamic topics for routing and filtering of RAP business events in SAP Advanced Event Mesh.

entry.title: 🔴 Improve Operational Efficiency using AI-enabled API Anomaly Detection
entry.content: API Anomaly Detection refers to the process of identifying unusual or unexpected behavior within API traffic. It involves continuous monitoring of API requests and responses, analyzing patterns, and detecting deviations from established norms. By doing so, organizations can swiftly identify potential security threats, performance bottlenecks, or operational irregularities. In this session, we look at the what, the why and the how aspects of API Anomaly Detection in SAP Integration Suite

entry.title: Re: Need an approval step to be added to Crossboarding ta...
entry.content:
Thanks @emily_nagengast  for sharing the below roadmap article

 
This is part of 2H 2024 release - https://roadmaps.sap.com/board?PRODUCT=089E017A62AB1EDA94C15F5EDB3320E1&range=CURRENT-LAST#;INNO=1FB...
 
 
 
 
Answer

entry.title: Re: SAP BTP Trial Account Creation and Enabling Integration Suite service(SAP CPI)
entry.content:
Hi guys,

Thanks for this tutorial. At step 22, after the role assignment on step 21, I am still experiencing unauthorised access to the Integration Suite. What am I missing here?

Thanks,

Luis,

entry.title: 🔴 Enterprise Automation with SAP: Latest Enhancements
entry.content: Join us to learn how you can combine integration, process analysis and automation to drive business transformation. Learn how to use event-driven architecture, act on top of the process mining and modeling, and integrate processes in heterogeneous landscapes, all while leveraging AI at scale. Discover the latest features in SAP Integration Suite, SAP Signavio, and SAP Build, and see how they can improve your enterprise automation efforts.

entry.title: Re: Firmware used in manufacturing BOMS
entry.content: Hi Caetano, what about of the of the qty and the unit measure? I can check the flag "bulk material" and after that means this is all done for no generated purchase requisition? thanks for the feedback

entry.title: Re: How to extract plan and actual costs for PM orders if...
entry.content:
You should able to see the data in the PMCO table -- for orders that do not have any data -Do you see value in the planned and actual side on the tab of those PM Orders?

Post screenshots to see if anything needs to be checked.

entry.title: Re: Using SAP Companion Extended Scenario in S/4HANA
entry.content:
Hi Kavinprabu,

It is not necessary for users to be authenticated to access the standard content but it is necessary for the customer-specific content so in general, SSO, should be turned on to prevent the need for customers to manually authenticate.  If the user ignores the manual login screen, I'm not sure how SAP Companion will respond because it is expecting communication from Manager, based on the user manually authenticating.  So, if the standard content does not appear until the user closes the manual login screen, the users will either have to do that or SSO will need to be turned on to prevent the users from having to do anything.

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Re: Adding elements to Trainer bar
entry.content:
Hi,

These controls are not managed through the Playback Settings but the individual properties of the Book object.  Just make sure that the two settings are not turned no, i.e. no tick, for the relevant Book objects.

You will likely want to fix this on the Book template object as well to prevent the need to do it on every new eLearning course that you create.

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Re: Insert a plugin in Design Production Processes
entry.content:
The code was written as shown in the picture,
hjmplugin10, which is VIEW_PLUGIN, was inserted into POD Designer, and hjmplugin10 Asynch Execution Plugin 2, which is EXECUTION_PLUGIN, was inserted into DPP.
After that, I registered only hjmplugin10 in the Manage Service Registry. Is this a problem?
Or do you know another way to solve the problem?

Do you have any other suggestions or ideas on how to achieve the desired functionality?

entry.title: Re: Custom Situation Handling Use Case for Professional Services: Unstaffed Resource Requests
entry.content:
Hi.

I have found the job for Extended Situations: SIT2_RT_BATCH, so the extended situations got save in tables SIT2*. I have run in dialog mode and I can see that my Custom Situation Gets triggered. Now I have to create a dialy job for that program and that will solve my issues. 

Best Regards:

Luis Lara.

entry.title: Re: How can I check the debt amount after the fee is dedu...
entry.content: I removed the finance tag and added the ABAP tag.

entry.title: "Send ERP Delivery Messages" PPF is not executing from EWM to ERP post Goods receipt
entry.content:
Hello,

We are setting up the Decentralized EWM system (2309) and trying to create our 1st Inbound Delivery in EWM. Inbound Delivery has been created in ERP and distributed to EWM. We have done Goods receipt in EWM and the PPF "Send ERP Delivery messages" is in yellow status and have not executed it. Why it has not executed automatically even though settings are in placed

Also when we try to reprocess it, it is giving time out dump.

Can anyone provide any advice on this?

entry.title: Client-secret change in every CAP app deploy
entry.content:
I have an issue when I deploy my CAP app the client-secret change in every deploy.

I have any idea to control this issue. 

This is my first client secret.

Because the users refresh UI5 app. After that the app return error 500 Intenal server error. 

When I check the destination, this returns 200 OK, but I do not sure about this result. 

When I deploy my CAP app again my client secret change again.

 

When I set this new client secret on destination my UI5 app works again.

Best regards,

Angel gutierrez

entry.title: Automatically block Concur expense posting for every WBS
entry.content:
Hello,

 

When creating a WBS, we can manually block posting from Concur Expenses.

Is there an option to block this automatically for every WBS created?

Thank You

entry.title: Workitems Not Coming In Engineering Inbox For Approval
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We are using the NWBC recipe development. Whenever the new recipe is created and submitted for approval those person's SAP ID is maintained in group gets the recipe workflow in their Engineering Inbox tile to approve it, but there is one user whose ID is there in recipe distribution list but still he is not able to received the workflow in his Engineering Inbox. I have also check the agents assigned through SWIA transaction, his name is also appearing their still it's not showing. I'm new to this system, so can you help me how I can troubleshoot this issue further. What things I need to check. Step by step information will help a lot. Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Can't see Open Rejected Envelopes
entry.content:
Hi Community experts,

When my project owner opened envelopes, they selected only one supplier and now we can't see the others.

The envelope rules are configured with YES in “allow rejected envelope bids to be opened”, but the “Open Rejected envelope” option is not available.

I have checked the rules on the template, and the status, and can't see why we're missing this option.

Has anyone experienced this before?

entry.title: Re: Can't see Open Rejected Envelopes
entry.content:
Hello, 

Is your event in Pending Selection status?

entry.title: Re: Can't see Open Rejected Envelopes
entry.content:
Hi, I would suggest making sure the user experiencing this issue is part of the Recover Rejected Envelopes group in the correct realm. If you're in that group in Test but the event is in Prod you'll not see the correct option, for example. 

Hope this helps!

entry.title: Re: DTW error on SAP HANA 10 FP2308
entry.content: C:\program-files\sap\Data Transfer Workbench\Interop.SAPbobsCOM.dll is wrong. replace it with a correct one(from another machine).

entry.title: Re: How to Reduce Database DTU on SAP Commerce Cloud
entry.content:
@David_A_C You have a good point. Unfortunately there is no query store on replica so not easy to investigate issues

@dgbeale Are you referring to DTU consumption reported in SAP4Me to compare with entitlement? If this is the case, DTU provisioned is reported and not DTU used.

entry.title: Movement type for container/customer consignment
entry.content:
What is the proper movement type to be used for move material (with Material Number) from one container/customer consignment (sprecial stock : W) to another container?

At the moment, we use 932 to move back to SLoc store then repost 931 to transfer to another container.

It to be best if we able to transfer straight away

entry.title: Re: SAP Landscape Management Cloud discontinued
entry.content:
Hi @Marco_Dorn ,

Can you please clarify what is "SAP's product strategy" given LAMA is being sunset, and SAP's move away from providing solutions for on-premises environments?  As a customer what should we be doing?

Also, if we were implementing S/4HANA on a cloud hyperscaler (eg Azure or AWS), but still managing the full-stack in-house (eg not a RISE or GROW customer), I'm assuming like on-premises, there will be no LAMA (or equivalent) option available?

Cheers

Shaun

entry.title: Re: Task 3 - Enhancing CDS View Entities with Annotations
entry.content: My Solution:

entry.title: Using Variable Pay to Configure Incentive Deferrals
entry.content:
Over the years I have been involved in several variable pay implementations for customers in the financial services and insurance industries.  One of the recurring themes I hear in the requirements gathering workshops is the need to defer employee incentive payments in either cash or shares/stock to a later point in time.  This requirement can be due to legal obligations, or some organisations use deferred incentive payments as a long term cash based incentive option.

To achieve this requirement, we often need a combination of custom fields, custom calculations, and lookup tables.  Let’s look at a couple of examples of how we can configure deferral calculations using SAP SuccessFactors Variable Pay.

Prerequisites:

  • The template is configured with a final incentive payment field.  This can be the standard ‘Final Payout’ field or a custom field.
  • Data points that determine employee deferral eligibility are available in Employee Central and can be pulled into the template.
  • Template integration to Employee Central is assumed but the below can be achieved without integration as well

Example 1 – Defer a portion of the incentive payment paid in cash

In this example, the requirement from the customer is to take a portion of the final payment and defer this value to a later point in time.  The first thing to determine is which employees are eligible for the deferral payment.  This will differ for all customers but can be based on paygrade, job level, position, incentive plan type or even a custom identifier in the employees Job Information record.  If your requirement for deferral payments is based on the employee’s job responsibilities, the recommendation is to store this against the position not just the employee so future incumbents of the position will also inherit this identifier.

Once the population is identified, the system needs to know what percentage or amount of the final incentive payment should be deferred.  Again, this may be the same for all employees or it may differ depending on an identifier against the employee.

In the screenshot below, we use a Yes/No flag configured in Employee Central to determine deferral eligibility (‘Deferral Applicable’) and a lookup table based on Paygrade to determine the deferral percentage applicable (‘Deferral %’).

Example 2 – Defer a portion of the incentive payment paid in shares

In example 2, the same logic applies as in example 1 except this time we are calculating the deferred component to be allocated in share/stock rights which vest in 3 years.  The share price used at the time of allocation (‘VWAP’ in the screenshot below) is input using a lookup table as the value might need to be loaded once the worksheets are already live.  The ‘Number of Shares’ column is a calculated field that takes the ‘Deferred Amount’ / ‘VWAP’ to get the total share allocation.  In the screenshot below partial shares are allocated, but the round formula can be added to the calculation to round the number of shares up or down if partial shares are not required. The vesting period can be hard coded, input via a lookup table or custom formula if there is different logic applicable to different employee groups.

Additional Notes:

  • The above logic could be applied to an incentive plan configured using the compensation module
  • It is possible to publish future non-recurring one time payments so a deferred cash payment can be scheduled (assuming no criteria other than termination would deem an employee ineligible to receive the deferred payment).  For more information on setting custom publish dates for non-recurring pay components refer to this KBA.

entry.title: Re: Set Initialize Value for Purchase Order in S4HANA

entry.title: SAP Digital Skills Initiative
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano 

I identify as a person in the below categories and am interested in the SAP Digital Skills initiative:

    • Minorities who may not have equal opportunity in their geographic location 
    • First generation college students
    • People looking to switch their careers mid-life

I am willing to learn more about SAP and to undergo the rigors of studying for SAP Certification. I am currently in the job search process after experiencing health issues last year and I believe the SAP Certification would be instrumental in relaunching my career. 

Thank you

entry.title: Re: Task 3 - Enhancing CDS View Entities with Annotations
How to raise a complaint in Myntra?
entry.content: You can contact Myntra to raise a complaint by using the "Contact Us" 👉 ..8167^38^2067=//tab on the Myntra page. This will open the Myntra Help Center, which offers 24/7 customer care support. You can: Choose a type of issue or help topic✅ 7894~69~3158 Submit your query or complaint Escalate your query or complaint if it's not resolved

entry.title: Re: How to raise a complaint in Myntra?
entry.content: Good

entry.title: Re: SAM 2310 error message code 500
entry.content:
Hi,

Is this issue resolved or still happening? If it's happening, please look at my another reply.

entry.title: Re: SAM 2310 error message code 500
entry.content:
This might be because of the amount of data that is available for these users. You may involve a technical consultant to analyse traces to see which Batch call it is stopping at.

You may also review ICM timeout parameters with your Basis team. For ICM timeout parameters, you may check SAP Note https://me.sap.com/notes/824554/E

Regards,

Sahil Dudeja

entry.title: Re: BTP problem to activate Signavio
entry.content:
Hi

It appears that Signavio entitlement is not available on the BTP Global account that you have logged into.

2 possible reasons - either the entitlement has not been processed yet or the entitlement was added to a different BTP Global Account.

Best option - reach out to your SAP/Signavio Sales Executive and ask them to investigate what's happening with your entitlement. Alternatively, you can reach out to the Support team via SAP4ME.

Regards,
Projit

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano

I am Rajesh Nambiar. I have had over 20 years experience as Business Analyst and consultant in the Finance and Banking domains (primarily). I have worked in Core Banking, Data Warehouse, Loan Origination Systems, API integration, Banking payments and Fraud Risk Management implementations and testing projects.
I do have some background as an end user of ERP systems in the initial days of career. Had been exposed to Accounting, Costing, Human Resources Management and Cash management during my first - 5-year stint, as an Accountant at Bahrain. Due to the Y2K issue, I focussed on migrating the existing accounting systems and this experience inspired me to move to the IT industry.
I am willing to learn more about SAP - FICO and MM/SD since I feel I do have the base experience.
Currently I am on the lookout for a stable position as a consultant and I am convinced that being an SAP consultant would be good career transition decision after more than 25 years in the BFSI sector.
Appreciate if you can enroll me in the digital skills initiative which would be a great way to move forward in my career.

Thanks and best regards
Rajesh Nambiar

entry.content: Hello Experts, Please help with expert advise. Thank you, Thangaraj Thomas

entry.title: Re: Protecting SAP RISE Customer Data - Building on AWS Security Capabilities
entry.content: Very well written article! Thank you for sharing much needed insights of how technical security is done in RISE on AWS!

entry.title: Re: Missing data when exporting ALV Report to Excel
entry.content:
Hi,

I got a similar issue. Two columns with unneccessary ICON functionality where not exported to EXCEL.
After removing the ICON: SOLVED 🙂

     lr_column ?= lr_columns->get_column( 'ANLAGE' ).
      lr_column->set_cell_type( if_salv_c_cell_type=>hotspot ).
*      lr_column->set_icon( if_salv_c_bool_sap=>true ).
Regards Mario

entry.title: Re: SAP Public Cloud QM function : COA form printting
entry.content:
Hi @HuijunWang,

Please refer the below SAP help portal link to get the details of steps to configure the Quality Certificate,

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/d1e58be39d884a0dbf75a7526a9acbf4/b46eb6531de6b64ce10000000a174cb4.html?q=Certificate%20of%20Analysis

And to create custom Form template, please refer below steps:

  • Install and configure ‘SAP Cloud Print Manager’ application to print the COA Form. Create communication user and Maintain Print Queue in SAP S/4HANA Cloud System. Please refer blog https://blogs.sap.com/2017/08/07/cloud-print-manager-installation-and-configuration/
  • Design your custom COA Form template as per business requirement and bind the fields (supports both standard and custom fields) to the SAP S/4HANA Cloud using ‘Adobe LiveCycle Designer’. It supports to select both the Standard and custom fields as per business requirements and captured in a form. https://help.sap.com/docs/CP_FORMS_BY_ADOBE/6d3eac5a9e3144a7b43932a1078c7628/3537dc5044b8461a9fe26b26aef37c34.html
  • Create New form template in SAP S/4HANA Cloud system using Fiori app ‘Maintain Form Template’ by uploading the template designed in Step 2.
  • Assign the Form Template to the respective Application type in customization configuration.
  • Add output with newly created custom COA form template in the respective Fiori application and assign it to the print queue created in Step1 to print the COA Form.

Please refer the scope item 1LQ (Output Management) to implement business scenarios which include output-related tasks. https://rapid.sap.com/bp/scopeitems/1LQ

To get the API details available in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud, please refer https://api.sap.com/products/SAPS4HANACloud/apis/all

And for your below query, Embedded SAC is supported in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud.

Thanks and Regards,

Prabha A

entry.title: Re: VAT Report Previews
entry.content:
Hi you should also be activating scope items 1J2. The moment you activate 1J2 you should be able to see the report category and predelivered reports and Reporting entity in setting up statutory repot config id. 

 

For licence part you should always connect with Account executive SAP assigned for your project.

entry.title: Re: Tool Life Monitoring for PRT assigned in routing

entry.title: Rating system with forfait including different rating elements
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

my customer has the following requirement for the pricing calculation of his subscriptions:

Usage-based with 2 rating elements: "Driver" and "Vehicle", both can be "active" and "inactive" (this info will be sent by the external system transferring consumption records to subscription billing).
Currently, "Driver" and "Vehicle" are rate elements, while "active" and "inactive" are rate subelements but I can change the configuration if necessary.

- at the end of the month, a forfait of ex. 60€ is billed for a consumption of 1 to 19 units (both "Driver" and "Vehicle", both "active" and "inactive").
- as of the 20th unit, a unit price is applied: 5€/ea for Driver/active and Vehicle/active, 3€ for Driver/inactive and Vehicle/inactive.

Example of consumption (received in Subscription billing in following order as well):

6 Driver/active
6 Driver/inactive
6 Vehicle/active
6 Vehicle/inactive
 total invoice: 60€ (19 units) + (5 Vehicle/inactive*3€) = 60 + 15 = 75 €

do you have any idea/suggestion on how this can be achieved in Subscription billing?

Thank you very much in advance.

Kr,

Elena
